name: Columbus Pawn Shop
description_short: Columbus Pawn Shop is a newly opened pawn shop on Columbus's South side that buys and lends against electronics, jewelry, and merchandise.
description_long:
Columbus Pawn Shop is a newly established pawn operation located at 1704 Parsons Ave on the South side of Columbus, Ohio. The business appears to have launched recently and operates as a traditional pawn shop model. According to their Facebook presence, they are actively building their customer base and establishing themselves in the local market.

The shop offers collateral-based lending and purchasing services. Their primary focus areas include electronics, jewelry, and general merchandise. Customers can pawn items for short-term loans or sell merchandise outright to the shop. The business advertises periodic discounts and promotions to attract customers.

Columbus Pawn Shop differentiates itself by being a new, locally-focused operation on Columbus's South side rather than an established chain. They maintain direct communication channels including phone and email, and actively engage on Facebook to build community awareness. The shop operates with a moderate price range ($$) positioning.

As a startup pawn shop with minimal online presence beyond Facebook, the business has limited review history (2 reviews on Facebook with no rating established). Potential customers should note the business is brand new, meaning operational procedures and inventory consistency are still being established. Hours of operation were not fully detailed in available information. The shop's long-term viability and reputation remain to be demonstrated.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Newly opened shop with fresh inventory acquisition efforts
Direct local presence on South side of Columbus with accessible physical location
Multiple contact methods available: phone (614-444-7296), email, and Facebook messaging
Actively buying merchandise across multiple categories (electronics, jewelry, etc.)
Advertises periodic discounts and promotions for customers
Moderate pricing structure ($$) rather than premium rates
cons: Brand new business with unestablished reputation and no verified rating despite 2 reviews
Minimal operational information available (hours not clearly listed, policies unclear)
Limited online presence beyond Facebook makes it difficult to research services
No customer testimonials or detailed reviews to assess service quality
Startup status means procedures and consistency may still be in development
best_for: South Columbus residents needing immediate cash via collateral loans
Individuals looking to sell used electronics, jewelry, or merchandise locally
Customers seeking pawn services from a neighborhood-based operator rather than chains
diagnosis: Columbus Pawn Shop is best suited for South Columbus residents needing quick collateral-based loans or looking to sell used goods locally. However, as a brand-new operation with minimal online presence and no established reputation, customers should exercise caution regarding service standards, loan terms, and long-term reliability until the business demonstrates consistent operations and customer satisfaction.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
